channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump says framework of Iran deal 'largely negotiated,' with provision to reopen strait
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Middle East crisis live: fate of strait of Hormuz hangs in balance as Trump claims Iran deal ‘largely negotiated’
- Trump says agreement with Iran 'largely negotiated,' includes opening strait
- Trump says peace deal with Iran ‘largely negotiated’ with strait of Hormuz to open
- Trump faces growing pressure to reopen Hormuz Strait — one way or another
- Trump says deal with Iran to reopen Hormuz ‘largely negotiated’
- Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
- US official says Washington, Tehran reach preliminary deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz: Reports
- Iran-Israel war Highlights: Trump says agreement with Iran 'largely negotiated,' includes opening strait
- Control over Strait of Hormuz is ‘lifeline’ for the regime, experts tell ‘Post’

- Strait of Hormuz to reopen after Muslim Eid holiday ends? Check big updates on U.S.-Iran peace deal
- Middle East Grapples With the Downsides of a Trump Deal With Iran
- Strait of Hormuz reopening, nuclear programme dispute: US, Iran inch closer to peace deal | What we know
- US, Iran near 60-day ceasefire deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz
- Iranian Officials Say Proposed Peace Deal Would Open Strait of Hormuz

- Iranian Officials Say Proposed Peace Deal Would Open Strait of Hormuz
- Trump claims deal with Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz ‘largely negotiated’
- US-Iran 60 day deal will open Strait of Hormuz, lift oil sanctions, end Lebanon war - report
- Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated', dispute over strait reopening
- ‘Deal framework largely negotiated': Trump signals Iran breakthrough, says Hormuz could reopen soon
- Hormuz reopening, Iranian oil sales, overseas funds: What's inside US-Iran 60-day peace plan that's ‘close to signing’
- US-Iran war news LIVE: Peace deal ‘close’, toll-free Strait of Hormuz likely to open; Netanyahu ‘frozen out’ of talks
- From Hormuz to nuclear talks - what to expect in the 60-day US-Iran ceasefire proposal
- Iran refutes Trump's 'largely negotiated' deal, claims to keep Hormuz control
- Proposed US-Iran deal involves opening Strait of Hormuz during 60-day ceasefire extension: Report
- Trump Says Iran Deal May Reopen Hormuz, But Tehran Insists Strait Stays Under Its Control]]>
